rawAssistant: That's a good question, considering the recent commotion in Hollowfen and our own... unusual occurrences here at the Marsh Archivist's office. Let me check my notes on the archive's wake-up pattern. According to previous records, we've had the archive stir when strange energies shift in the land – often tied to significant events or changes in the local ecosystem. Given the recent rain and the glow reports on the north road, it's possible that some sort of resonance has awakened the archive, drawing our attention to it once more.
